Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty
Microservice API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty
    Class
    Description
    HealthProbeSettings
    Settings for the built-in health probe resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
    Class
    Description
    Health
    Component health result returned from a HealthIndicator.
    Health.Builder
    Builder for Health.
    HealthAggregator.ComponentHealth
    Component payload in the response.
    HealthAggregator.HealthResponse
    Probe response payload.
    HealthIndicator
    Functional SPI for reporting health of one component.
    HealthProbe
    Probe categories supported by the built-in health probe resource.
    HealthProbeSettings
    Settings for the built-in health probe resource.
    HealthProbeSettings.Builder
    Builder for HealthProbeSettings.
    HealthStatus
    Status values returned by HealthIndicator checks.
    ReadinessState
    Shared, observable readiness flag consumed by HealthAggregator to gate the readiness probe.
